MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CRROSS-DEFENDANT ERICA L. BRACHFELD, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 922-5939, specially appearing for cross defendant Erica L. Brachfeld and Moving party; Keith Belt, (415) 572-1987, Defendant in Pro Per appearing and opposing party. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to set aside default is granted as to Cross-defendant Erica L. Brachfeld. The policy of deciding cases on the merits requires the granting of the motion. Cross-defendant Erica L. Brachfeld to file answer to cross-complaint by 11/24/09. Counsel and Pro Per Defendant waive notice of today's ruling. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235

Moving party to provide courtesy copy of moving papers to Department 302 and to also serve opposing party no later than 11/03/09. Opposition due 11/13/09. No reply. Notice to be sent by Court.
